title: The Minimum Useful Video Factory
body: Define the smallest pipeline that creates reviewable drafts and playable videos.
visualDirection: Bold title slate with a clear product-risk framing.
caption: Define the smallest pipeline that creates reviewable drafts and playable videos.

title: Point 1
body: A draft package should include script, storyboard, captions, metadata, and QA notes.
visualDirection: Large readable text, subtle motion, and a progress cue.
caption: A draft package should include script, storyboard, captions, metadata, and QA notes.

title: Point 2
body: The render step should consume the package directly, not a separate hand-built file.
visualDirection: Large readable text, subtle motion, and a progress cue.
caption: The render step should consume the package directly, not a separate hand-built file.

title: Point 3
body: Validation should check both content completeness and MP4 existence.
visualDirection: Large readable text, subtle motion, and a progress cue.
caption: Validation should check both content completeness and MP4 existence.

title: What this unlocks
body: When the MP4 is real, publishing is just the next integration layer.
visualDirection: Final decision-oriented slate with a direct closing line.
caption: When the MP4 is real, publishing is just the next integration layer.
